scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@hcs/id-scanner-core && npm run build --workspace=@hcs/id-scanner-demo-web
scripts.type-check: npm run build --workspace=@hcs/id-scanner-core && tsc -p packages/react/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/native/tsconfig.json && tsc -b apps/demo-web && tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit
